entities.name: Self-Advocacy Skill Gap
entities.context: V's core belief that the primary barrier for job seekers is inability to communicate their value, not lack of qualifications

entities.name: Spray-and-Pray Tools
entities.context: Mass-application tools that V believes fail to address the fundamental self-advocacy deficit

entities.name: Employer Value Messaging
entities.context: The ability to translate accomplishments into messaging that resonates with employers — the skill most candidates lack

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company, implied as the solution to the self-advocacy gap (this position is in the hiring-market domain)

entities.name: Hiring Market
entities.context: The domain this position belongs to — V's area of expertise and Careerspan's operating space

relationships.context: The gap is specifically the inability to produce effective employer-facing messaging from one's own accomplishments
V believes these tools fail because they increase volume without addressing the underlying communication deficit
Careerspan is positioned to close the self-advocacy gap that other tools ignore
V positions this gap as the central, unaddressed problem in the hiring market
